newAdmin.description: creates an administrator who can manage groups, users and archiving of content across an RSpace Community, but can't create content.
newAdmin.label: Community Admin

newPi.description: creates a LabGroup ‘owner’ and generates a new LabGroup for them to manage.

newSysAdmin.description: allows an existing System Admin to create another system-wide administrator with equal permissions, but who can't create content.
newSysAdmin.label: System Admin

newUser.description: creates a default user who may be placed in an existing LabGroup.

createAccountForm.backdoorUsernameWarning: Backdoor account - pick a username that won't conflict with potential SSO user!

notePassword.label: Please copy or manually note this password, as it must be delivered to the new user outside RSpace.

password.helpText: 8 - 50 characters. Numbers, letters, spaces and special characters are allowed.

filestores.disabled:
Filestore linking is disabled for RSpace users - they won't see "Filestores" section in their Gallery.
To enable the functionality set netfilestores.enabled deployment property to true and restart RSpace.
filestores.enabled: Filestore linking is enabled for RSpace users.
filestores.exportDisabled: Option to include filestore files in archive export is disabled.
filestores.exportEnabled: Option to include filestore files in archive export is enabled.

validation.piRoleNotAssigned: {0} does not have a 'PI' role to be revoked.
validation.piRoleStillAssignedInGroup: {0} cannot yet have PI role revoked, as they are still the PI of at least one group. Please assign a new PI to these groups. Once {0} is no longer a PI of a group, the PI role can be revoked.

description.allowProjectGroups: When true, users can create Project Groups (which don't have a PI)
description.apiOauthAuthentication: Enables accessing public API with OAuth authentication flow
description.boxApiEnabled: Allow users to make Versioned links to Box files. This requires RSpace communicating with Box API, so RSpace instance has to be registered on Box page, and box.client.id / box.client.secret have to be set in deployment.properties file
description.boxAvailable: Makes Box integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, user can importfrom Box into the Gallery and (with 'box.linking.enabled = true') link to Box in text field editor
description.boxLinkingEnabled: Enables linking to Box in text field editor. Relevant only if 'box.available' is 'true'
description.chemistryAvailable: Makes chemistry integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, users can create and edit chemical sketches, and search for chemical structures in the Workspace
description.clustermarketAvailable: Makes Calira (formerly Clustermarket) integration available. After enabling the integration, users can link to data regarding laboratory equipment.
description.dropboxAvailable: Makes Dropbox integration available to the users. After enabling the integration user can import from Dropbox into the Gallery and (with 'dropbox.linking.enabled = true') link to Dropbox in text field editor
description.dropboxLinkingEnabled: Enables linking to Dropbox in text field editor. Relevant only if 'dropbox.available' is 'true'
description.dryadAvailable: Makes Dryad integration available. User can create new dryad submissionand attach RSpace exports or documents to that submission.
description.egnyteAvailable: Makes Egnyte integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, users can link to Egnyte in text field editor
description.evernoteAvailable: Enables users to import Evernote XML export files via Create->Import
description.githubAvailable: Makes Github integration available. After enabling, user can add links to files in Github repositories.
description.googleDriveAvailable: Makes Google Drive integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, user can link to Google Drive in text field editor
description.groupAutosharingAvailable: Enables the management of group-wide autosharing.Enables PIs and lab admins with the 'View All' permission to manage the autoshare status for non-PI lab members.
description.msTeamsAvailable: Makes MS Teams integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, user can connect to their MS Teams channels to send messages or forward notifications
description.nextcloudAvailable: Makes Nextcloud integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, users can link to Nextcloud in text field editor
description.omeroAvailable: Makes Omero integration available. After enabling the integration, users can link to Omero image data.
description.oneDriveAvailable: Makes OneDrive integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, users can import from OneDrive into the Gallery and (with 'onedrive.linking.enabled = true') link to OneDrive in text field editor
description.oneDriveLinkingEnabled: Enables linking to OneDrive in text field editor. Relevant only if 'onedrive.available' is 'true'
description.orcidAvailable: Enables ORCID integration. After enabling the integration, users can set up their ORCID ID on 'My Profile' page.
description.owncloudAvailable: Makes ownCloud integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, users can link to ownCloud in text field editor
description.piCanEditAllWorkInLabgroup: Gives PI edit access to all data in their LabGroup.
description.protocolsIoAvailable: Makes Protocols.io integration available, allowing users to create documents from the protocols available through that service.
description.publicLastLoginAvailable: If enabled, a user's last login time is publicly viewable on their profile page.
description.publicdocsAllowSeo: Enables search engine indexing of published documents.
description.pyratAvailable: Makes PyRAT integration available. After enabling the integration, users can link to animals in the PyRAT database.
description.raidAvailable: Enables RAiD integration. After enabling the integration, users can set up their RAiD accounts through the 'Apps' page
description.repoAvailable: Makes {0} repository integration available. After enabling, users can submit exports to a {0} repository.
description.selfServiceLabgroups: When true, a user with permissions (e.g. a PI) can create a LabGroup.
description.slackAvailable: Makes Slack integration available to the users. After enabling the integration, user can connect to their Slack channels to send messages or forward notifications
description.snapgeneAvailable: Enables Snapgene viewer for DNA sequence files. This must only be enabled if the deployment property'snapgene.web.url' is configured to point at an RSpace-Snapgene web-service.

errors.invalidUsernameFormat: User details were in an invalid format - please use the autocomplete to choose a user.
